name: provider_register_patient_companion
description: Provider companion app for registering a new patient from the global companion surface, with duplicate detection on similar name + DOB and matching phone number.

applications.name: Register Patient
applications.description: Register a new patient from the provider companion launcher, with duplicate-patient detection before create.

handlers.description: Serves the register patient UI, runs duplicate detection, emits the CreatePatient effect, and serves a poll endpoint that resolves the new patient's UUID.
